description: Engineered a scalable UI test automation framework using Playwright to validate complex AI workflows, ensuring high-fidelity interactions across enterprise platforms.
Developed specialized AI testing strategies to address non-deterministic outputs and validate semantic equivalence, improving overall response accuracy by 25%.
Designed negative test suites targeting LLM vulnerabilities and prompt injection attacks, significantly enhancing platform security and reliability.
Relocated to secure Permanent Residency (PR) via the Manitoba Provincial Nominee Program (Skill Trade).
Proactively maintained and expanded technical expertise by continuously upskilling and evaluating new automation tools and AI-driven frameworks.
Explored and integrated modern development workflows, CI/CD pipelines, and advanced UI testing methodologies to prepare for the next generation of QA.
Reduced regression testing time by 45% by designing and implementing a robust automation suite using Selenium WebDriver, accelerating release cycles.
Decreased location-based overlay bugs by 40% and accelerated delivery sprints by 30% by leading weekly bug triage meetings to set severity and priority.
Ensured confident deployments by authoring comprehensive test plan documentation and leading release readiness reviews with key stakeholders.
Validated backend data integrity by writing complex SQL/MySQL queries to investigate inconsistencies and prepare precise test environments.
Elevated team testing practices by training two junior QA analysts on automation best practices, resulting in more efficient bug resolution.
Minimized production hold time by 60% by swiftly investigating issues, providing immediate workarounds, and collaborating with global development teams.
Improved support efficiency by 40% by building and training a team of three junior analysts and implementing new ticket resolution SOPs.
Guaranteed production readiness by remotely performing daily health checks on six critical workstations for a California manufacturing facility.
Ensured financial accuracy by managing end-of-day processing for customer invoices, successfully identifying and correcting errors before client impact.
Maintained system stability during critical business periods by providing L1/L2 support for an IFS-ERP system and using SQL/MySQL for troubleshooting.
Supported seamless ERP operations across manufacturing, finance, and logistics departments by monitoring server and application health during peak hours.
Ensured smooth order processing and inventory management for FMCG operations by adjusting orders prior to dispatch to align with client needs.
Optimized stock movement between the central warehouse and FMCG outlets by searching for and verifying items in the order sheet, reducing discrepancies.
Supported decision-making by preparing logistics reports and operational analyses for the General Manager and senior management.

projects.title: Azure Cloud Migration
description: Led the complete migration of LiveAquaria.com's eCommerce platform and admin portal to Microsoft Azure, reducing operational costs while enhancing scalability.
Validated compatibility across diverse browsers and devices via extensive Mobile Cross-Platform Testing, ensuring a consistent user experience.
Streamlined testing processes and improved accuracy by designing and executing automated test cases with Selenium WebDriver.
Ensured system scalability and reliability under high traffic conditions by conducting thorough Load Testing using JMeter.

projects.title: Cognitive search implementation
description: Successfully migrated the SLI Search Bar to Azure Search for LiveAquaria.com, seamlessly indexing the product catalog and optimizing query processing.
Validated responsive search functionality across diverse browsers and mobile devices to ensure cross-platform compatibility.
Verified seamless communication between Azure-based components by conducting thorough API testing using Postman.
Evaluated system performance and guaranteed reliability under high traffic conditions through rigorous stress and load testing with JMeter.

projects.title: Unified Responsive Design for LiveAquaria.com
description: Eliminated maintenance inefficiencies by migrating LiveAquaria.com’s mobile site into a unified responsive design compatible across desktops, tablets, and smartphones.
Ensured design quality and responsiveness by defining testing objectives, creating comprehensive test plans, and executing cross-platform validation.
Secured system stability under high traffic by performing rigorous stress testing and collaborating with developers for rapid bug resolution.
Reduced long-term maintenance costs by consolidating updates into a single responsive platform, positioning the website for future technological growth.

projects.title: FedEx address verification API integration
description: Minimized unusual shipping cost deductions and improved cost accuracy by integrating the FedEx address verification API for LiveAquaria.com.
Validated backend and frontend API communication to ensure exact US shipping address verification and reliable customer checkout experiences.

projects.title: Vendor aggregation API project
description: Automated order detail transfers to specific vendors by integrating and validating a new vendor API into the CIS International and LiveAquaria systems.
Verified end-to-end data flow by testing order placements from the eCommerce application through to the ERP product database.
Ensured precise data synchronization by validating service scheduler timers and executing comprehensive database and ERP verification testing.

projects.title: LLM Vulnerability & Prompt Injection Test Suite
description: Architected a comprehensive, data-driven automation suite using Playwright to validate the behavior, security, and UI integration of an enterprise AI agent.
Integrated AI-assisted coding tools including VS Code, Claude Code, and Antigravity with Gemini Pro to accelerate framework development and test script generation.
Implemented a robust CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions to automatically run the Playwright test suite on every commit, ensuring continuous security validation.
Engineered automated workflows to simulate multi-turn conversational JavaScript chat inputs and systematically capture AI responses for strict validation.
Prioritized AI security and mitigated prompt injection vulnerabilities by designing dynamic test data strategies to challenge platform guardrails.

testimonials.name: Kaushala Rajakaruna
testimonials.quote: He consistently demonstrated strong ownership of his work and delivered high-quality results. I can confidently say that he will be a valuable asset to any organization.
testimonials.text: Indeewara Gunathilaka who worked in my QA Team - I found him to be an exceptionally well-organized and highly dependable QA engineer. He consistently demonstrated strong ownership of his work and delivered high-quality results, even under tight timelines and pressure.  What truly sets indeewara apart is his out-of-the-box thinking. He doesn’t just test what is given — he challenges assumptions, anticipates risks, and identifies edge cases that significantly improve product quality. His analytical mindset and attention to detail helped the team prevent critical defects and improve overall system stability. He is also a very collaborative team member who communicates clearly, supports others, and contributes positively to team morale. Whether mentoring juniors, coordinating with developers, or driving test strategy, Indeewara handled responsibilities with maturity and professionalism. I can confidently say that he is a very strong resource and will be a valuable asset to any organization.

testimonials.role: Software Engineer | EDI Integration | Full-Stack Development | Data Visualization
testimonials.quote: A highly dependable and detail-oriented professional who consistently demonstrated exceptional problem-solving and teamwork skills.
testimonials.text: I had the pleasure of managing Indeewara Gunathilaka during his time as an Application Support Specialist at Teknowledge Shared Services. Indeewara is a highly dependable and detail-oriented professional who consistently demonstrated exceptional problem-solving and teamwork skills throughout his tenure.  He played a key role in minimizing production downtime by quickly identifying issues, implementing immediate workarounds, and coordinating effectively with development teams across the US, Thailand, and Sri Lanka to ensure timely resolutions. Indeewara also made a lasting impact by improving our support efficiency, he trained junior analysts and helped establish new standard operating procedures that significantly reduced ticket resolution time.  His technical expertise, proactive communication, and commitment to quality made him a vital member of our support operations. Indeewara consistently went above and beyond to ensure system stability and customer satisfaction, even during high-pressure situations.  I highly recommend Indeewara Gunathilaka for any technical or support engineering role. His dedication, analytical mindset, and collaborative nature would make him an asset to any organization.

testimonials.name: Danuka Opatha
testimonials.quote: Indeewara’s combination of technical knowledge, adaptability, and team-oriented mindset makes him a true asset to any organization.
testimonials.text: I had the privilege of managing Indeewara Gunathilaka at TeKnowledge Shared Services, first in his role as an Application Support Specialist and later as a QA Engineer. Having worked with him across these two capacities, I’ve seen firsthand how adaptable, dedicated, and growth-driven he is.  As an Application Support Specialist, Indeewara demonstrated excellent problem-solving skills, strong communication with stakeholders, and an unwavering commitment to resolving issues efficiently. His ability to understand business needs and provide practical solutions quickly made him a reliable go-to person for the team.  When he transitioned into QA Engineering, he took on the challenge with the same enthusiasm and professionalism. He quickly built expertise in testing methodologies, quality assurance practices, and worked collaboratively with developers to ensure smooth and successful project deliveries. As his Project Manager, I was impressed by his attention to detail, structured approach to testing, and his continuous drive to improve processes.  Indeewara’s combination of technical knowledge, adaptability, and team-oriented mindset makes him a true asset to any organization. I wholeheartedly recommend him for any role that requires both technical skill and collaborative spirit.

profileSummary: An experienced IT Professional possessing 6+ years' hands-on experience in Software Quality Assurance Engineering & System/Application Administration in diversified sectors spanning eCommerce, Retail, Logistics, Healthcare, and Telecommunications, actively seeking a role as a QA Engineer/IT Analyst. Known for effectively collaborating with cross-functional teams, establishing a positive work culture, driving high standards in quality assurance, and utilizing an analytical mindset to solve complex problems and ensure seamless operations.
